title: RealityMod
description: RealityMod is a Minecraft mod that aims to enhance the game's biomes, mobs and mechanics. It's currently undergoing a major overhaul, featuring new textures, models, and more realistic gameplay elements.
body:
![RealityMod Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Foxirion/RealityMod_Forge_1.20.1/bab2d0a871e848530fff9b986f9fcefbaef6d3cb/src/main/resources/realitymod_logo.png)

⚠️ Please note that RealityMod is currently in beta development. As such, you may encounter bugs or incomplete features. Your feedback and suggestions are invaluable as we continue to refine and expand the mod.

## ℹ️ About RealityMod is a Minecraft mod designed to immerse players in a more realistic gaming experience. By introducing elements inspired by real life, we aim to add depth and authenticity to your adventures, all while maintaining the classic Minecraft feel ## ✨ Features
🌴 Oasis Explore a serene oasis in the desert, home to unique flora and fauna.
🐢 Desert Turtles Discover these gentle creatures roaming the oasis and desert offering valuable resources.
🥥 Palm Trees and Coconut Harvest palms for a refreshing drink and valuable materials.
🧱 Oasis Clay Unique superior clay found in the oasis. When smelted, it yields twice the amount of terracotta/bricks compared to regular clay/clay balls.
🛡️ Desert Turtle Shell Protect yourself with this durable helmet crafted from the scutes of desert turtles.
⛏️ Fossil Ores Uncover valuable resources hidden within four types of fossils: normal, deepslate, frozen, and nether.
## 🗓️ Planned Updates RealityMod is constantly evolving! Here's what you can expect in future updates: **_Upcoming Features:_** - **Restored Content**: Experience revamped versions of classic creatures like the Fennec Fox, Penguin, Grizzly Bear, and Black Bear, with updated models and textures. - **New Mobs and Entities**: Encounter entirely new creatures that will enrich your gameplay experience. - **Expanded World Generation**: Explore additional structures, biomes, and resources. - **Crafting Innovations**: Discover new ways to combine materials and create unique items. ## 📜 License This mod is licensed under the MIT License, allowing for free use, modification, and distribution, meaning you can use our mod in your modpacks. For more details, please see the full license included with the mod.
